title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama’s official CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, Code Llama, etc. locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python library (pip install ollama) that exposes chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete APIs.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client (npm install ollama) for Node and browsers with full API coverage.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you swap Ollama models into any chain or agent.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) with multi-user, RAG, plugins, dark mode.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client SDK (Maven Central) providing sync/async APIs, streaming, tools, and embeddings.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem (gem install ollama) that wraps the REST API with ActiveModel-style interfaces.

title: ollamaclient
summary: Minimal Go client library used internally by Ollama; good for embedding in CLI tools.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s sidebar chat.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI with shell completions, conversation history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri-based desktop app (Rust+React) for chatting with local models offline.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that listens in channels/DMs and responds using any pulled Ollama model.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client (NuGet) with async streaming, embeddings, and tool-calling support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container for CI pipelines and dev environments.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Simple retrieval-augmented-generation example using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain.

title: ollama-macos-menu
summary: macOS menu-bar app that starts/stops Ollama server and shows model status.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate (cargo add ollama-rust) providing strongly-typed async client and CLI.
